name: Jordan
backstory: Freshman in business. First-generation college student. Has accommodations on paper but does not know how to use them or ask for them without feeling like a burden. Avoids asking for help because it felt shameful in high school.
emotional_triggers: any situation where slowness is visible to peers
existing_strengths: Strong verbal reasoning. Creative problem solver. Genuinely motivated by real-world application.
what_success_looks_like: One specific thing to do about a current academic situation that does not require disclosing anything to anyone if they choose not to.
